title: Age of Scales & Bones
body:
**Age of Scales & Bones** is a large-scale RPG-focused fantasy modpack built around danger, progression, and exploration. The world is hostile, magic is powerful but earned, and survival requires preparation. This is not a fast endgame pack — every upgrade matters.

# Combat, Monsters & Challenge

The world is filled with deadly creatures and epic encounters thanks to:

**L_Ender’s Cataclysm**, **Alex’s Mobs**, **Mowzie’s Mobs**, **Ice and Fire**, **Legendary Monsters**

improved mob AI, unique boss mechanics, and dangerous abilities

combat that rewards preparation, positioning, and smart gear choices

Every major fight can be fatal if you are unprepared.

# Magic, Abilities & Progression

Magic and character growth are core mechanics:

**Iron’s Spells & Spellbooks**, **Ars Nouveau**, **Magic Circles**

spellcasting, abilities, upgrades, and specialization

no instant overpowered gear — power is unlocked gradually

Progression feels meaningful and earned.

# World Exploration & Structures

The world strongly encourages exploration:

**YUNG’s Better Dungeons, Mineshafts, Strongholds, Temples,** and more

**Moog’s Voyager Structures**, **Dungeons and Taverns**

ruins, fortresses, ancient cities, and dangerous locations

Exploration always carries risk — and great rewards.

# Gear, Weapons & Enchantments

Deep build customization through equipment:

**Simply Swords**, **Artifacts**, **Relics**

**Apothic Attributes & Enchantments**

powerful weapons, accessories, and synergistic bonuses

Your build matters more than raw stats.
